details: The user identifies 1437.5s as the best E088 frame.
The same timestamp was also used for E085.
Previous task 038 evidence associated E088 with a corrected 24:50-24:55 candidate window.
Do not silently overwrite either source.

observations: Uploaded image clearly shows the TELEPORTER sign.
Minimap and gameplay context remain visible.
Corrected candidate follows E087 in source order and shows a teleporter-sign/indoor context.
The frame group is visually distinct from the original duplicated E085 window.
Original window shares the same timestamp as E085.
Frames show surface-level teleporter/nearby context rather than resolving the underground enemy teleporter label.
